title: eragrostis plumosa
intro: Eragrostis plumosa, also known as Plumose Love Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis plumosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis plumosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
